title: Mischief
description: My random ass ideas turned into a minecraft mod.
body:
# Welcome To Mischief (NOW 2.0)

## Here's what was added:

### Resurgence Totems
![resurging ahh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06da00869e473a2b8486dd6412a9cc1c248fa5e0_0.webp)
These "totems" allow you to save a preset location. Then when you need to go somewhere and then return (for example, your inventory filling up during a mining trip), you just activate the totem, do your thing and when the timer ends you'll get sent back to the place you were previously. The time on the totems range from 10 seconds to 3 minutes. But if you want to go somewhere permanently we also have...

### Waypoint Totems
![sorry for the shitty quality, had to compress it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/056e494cbafaf339d007ecf87321e4afd7b4f8f6.png)
These allow you to save a permanent location. Then when you activate the totem, it sends you to that location, with the only downsides being you have to wait 3.5 seconds and that it is more expensive.

If you set either a Resurgence Totem or Waypoint Totem at a wrong location, you can easily reset them by putting them in an oven. 

### Reverse Ender Pearl
![also compressed, sorry](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80eb56b64d9936d86fe731ad578c7c8ac92da703.png)
You know how a regular ender pearl sends you to the location of whatever entity or block you hit? Well this does the opposite. Whichever entity you hit gets sent to your position.

### Phantom Raw Beef and Steak
![got yo ass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0afbaae5985239261828ac8e2bca97ac2b579095_0.webp)
I'm sorry to break your mood, but i did not add a mob drop to phantoms. By putting a raw steak and a phantom membrane in a crafting table, you create a food that gives you a lot of effect such as
- Health Boost (for 20 minutes)
- Saturation 6 (for 20 minutes)
- Absorption 6 (for 20 minutes)
- Jump Boost 6 (for 20 minutes)
- Poison (for 15 seconds)
- Blindness 4 (for 3 minutes)
- Slowness 4 (for 3 minutes)
- Glowing 4 (for 3 minutes)

But put that beef into a furnace, smoker or on a campfire and you get **Phantom Steak** which has all of the upsides
- Health Boost (for 20 minutes)
- Saturation 6 (for 20 minutes)
- Absorption 6 (for 20 minutes)
- Jump Boost 6 (for 20 minutes)
- Strength 6 (for 20 minutes)

and none of the downsides.

### Lead Suit and Jetpack
![crazy? i was crazy once](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb695e5160f9696fdaa8183b42f0d1768eb6575e.png)
Fun Fact: The Lead Suit was added in the preivous update (1.0), so you may be wondering why i added it again. Well apparently, coded the Lead Suit's uranium prevention code wrongly. So wrong that turns out, it just didnt work. So technically, it hasnt had any use until this update (sorry).

The Jetpack allows you to _very slowly_ go up and then float back down. _Just ignore the part where the keybind doesn't check if you're wearing the jetpack or not, shhh._

### PDP (Portable Deployable Platform)
![goofy goobers UNITE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8fcc48cd1bdcb3c07a01d5cee46c4b59acd0a2b.png)
This goofy little item allows you to deploy a 5 by 5 platform of light blue concrete to land on or bridge on. I have nothing else to add to this.

### Uranium Contaminated Water
![what the hip hop hell is this?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7868c29608864b94c6bb289eadc6ba7b58fb8ea0_0.webp)
*Yes the water is on purpose, yes that is a feature*
Because of how much crafting you have to do with uranium in this mod, i decided to add some water contaminated with uranium waste(Excess), so you can have some fun.

## Versions, Recipes and Future Fixes
- [1.16.5 Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/mischief/version/wqy5KAme)
- [1.18.2 Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/mischief/version/YDA5aZpC)
- [1.19.2 Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/mischief/version/Ga0h8csd)
- [1.19.4 Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/mischief/version/I8Qi80nU)
- [1.20.1 Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/mischief/version/vaYnf17g)
- [1.21.1 NeoForge](https://modrinth.com/mod/mischief/version/LZwxyOoq)
- [1.21.4 NeoForge](https://modrinth.com/mod/mischief/version/2.0)

FOR RECIPES:
- All recipes are in the gallery bc im too lazy
- If the recipe starts with "UPC_", that means its using the Uranium Powered Crafter
- If the recipe starts with "N_", that means its using the Crafting Table or the Smithing Table
- If the recipe starts with "C_", that means its probably a Furnace, but it could also be a Blast Furnace, Smoker or Campfire.

Future Fixes:
- Fix the secret texture
- Fix the secret audio across all versions
- Fix the Blast Furnace recipe for Phantom Steak
- Make the items with "remove durability" function, check if the player isnt in creative before removing.
- Make the Jetpack Keybind check if player is wearing the jetpack.
- Make the PDP check if player is trying to remove bedrock, if so then only fill the non-bedrock ones.
